spec.description: Path to a spec YAML whose persistence block is the desired shape; diffed against the live database.

from_entity.description: FQCN of a Cycle-annotated entity to diff against the live database (instead of a spec).

from_spec.description: Older spec path for a spec-vs-spec diff (no database needed).

to_spec.description: Newer spec path for a spec-vs-spec diff (no database needed).

driver.description: Preview SQL dialect. Defaults to the connected database, else postgres.

rename.description: Declared column renames as a comma list, e.g. "old:new,old2:new2".

skip_safety.description: Skip the read-only database safety checks.
